headline: 3 Reasons TER is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Teradyne has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 70.4%, reaching $374.00 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Teradyne (TER) Stock Sees Fair Value Lift As Analysts Raise AI Driven Forecasts
summary: The updated Teradyne model now points to a higher assessed fair value, rising from US$374.82 to US$416.65, an 11% move that has sharpened attention on where analysts see the stock settling. That shift sits alongside commentary highlighting heavier focus on semiconductor capital spending, AI infrastructure, and long term addressable market forecasts, with bulls and bears debating how Teradyne’s backlog quality and execution might justify or challenge these higher targets. As you read on, you...

headline: What History Tells Us About SpaceX Joining The Nasdaq-100
summary: Nasdaq has announced that SpaceX will be added to the Nasdaq-100 Index starting Tuesday, July 7, 2026.

headline: KLA Corporation and Teradyne Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the semiconductor sector pulled back amid fears that AI-driven chip demand may be cooling.
